Text.Page:
This can't go on. {@LinkCreature:231#1023$$Ghauth} is making the troops nervous.

Will you speak to {@LinkCreature:231#1013$$Urwah} at the {@Rgn:31009$$Beacon Point Garrison} and get a detailed update on the fleet?

I heard a foghorn off in the distance late last night. I’m positive it came from a federation ship.

The fleet should be visible by now.

There's a lookout spot on the shoreline if you head out to the water and follow the coastline to your left. Be careful, though, it's treacherous!

You should be able to catch sight of the Valkyon fleet from there. Then, we'll all know.

What? Really?

No sign of the fleet at all? It can’t be. I'm positive I heard that horn!

This is awful. What am I going to tell everyone?
